x-enumeration-literals.name: Success
x-enumeration-literals.description: Action executed successfully, requested result delivered.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending
x-enumeration-literals.description: Action accepted but not yet fully executed; requires background processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Requires_authentication
x-enumeration-literals.description: Action cannot proceed until customer re-authenticates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Requires_approval
x-enumeration-literals.description: Action paused awaiting manual or automated approval.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Failed_validation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Request failed due to invalid/missing input parameters.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Failed_authentication
x-enumeration-literals.description: Request failed due to incorrect or missing authentication.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rejected
x-enumeration-literals.description: Action explicitly denied due to business rules or risk controls.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Action was initiated but then stopped before completion.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Error_system
x-enumeration-literals.description: Request could not be completed due to a technical/system error.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Error_unknown
x-enumeration-literals.description: Request failed for an unspecified or unexpected reason.
